description: Sample Telegram message payload sent by the briefing workflow. Style: Style A (compact/terminal) with Style C news segmentation. No emoji. Telegram Markdown-safe. Max 4096 chars.

format_notes.style: Style A body (dash separators, left-aligned columns) + Style C news (source + time under each item)

telegram_limits.strategy: If total exceeds 4096 chars, split into two messages: [1] commodity + gainers + corporate action, [2] IDN news + international news

payload.text:
*IDN Market Briefing — Morning Edition*
10 March 2026 | 09:05 WIB
─────────────────────────

*COMMODITY STATS*
Palm Oil   : 4,820 MYR/t   +1.2%
Coal       :   138.5 USD/t  -0.4%
Nickel     : 16,340 USD/t  +0.8%
CPO Index  :  4,105         +0.6%

─────────────────────────
*TOP GAINERS — IDN STOCK*
Ticker  Daily   Weekly  Monthly
BBCA   +3.41%  +5.20%  +12.4%
GOTO   +2.87%  +4.10%   +8.7%
BMRI   +2.10%  +3.80%   +9.2%
ADRO   +1.95%  +6.40%  +18.1%
MTEL   +1.80%  +2.90%   +7.6%

*TOP GAINERS — US STOCK*
Ticker  Daily   Weekly  Monthly
NVDA   +4.21%  +9.20%  +31.5%
TSLA   +3.18%  +6.80%  +22.4%
META   +2.90%  +8.75%  +19.8%
AMZN   +1.75%  +5.90%  +14.2%
GOOG   +1.40%  +4.10%  +11.3%

*TOP GAINERS — CRYPTO*
Ticker  Daily   Weekly  Monthly
BTC    +2.90%  +8.40%  +22.4%
SOL    +4.11% +12.30%  +31.2%
ETH    +1.80%  +7.80%  +18.9%
BNB    +2.10%  +5.50%  +14.5%
AVAX   +3.50% +10.20%  +28.3%

─────────────────────────
*CORPORATE ACTION — IDN*
BBRI  Dividend      Rp 200/share   Record 20 Mar
TLKM  Rights Issue  1:5            Exercise 25 Mar
GOTO  Stock Split   1:10           Effective 1 Apr

─────────────────────────
*# IDN NEWS*
1. [Bank Indonesia tahan suku bunga di 5.75%](https://investasi.kontan.co.id/news/bi-rate)
   Kontan | 09:02 WIB
2. [BBCA catat laba Rp 48.6T sepanjang 2025](https://market.bisnis.com/news/bbca-laba)
   Bisnis.com | 08:45 WIB
3. [Pemerintah naikkan royalti batu bara 28%](https://finance.detik.com/news/royalti)
   Detik Finance | 08:30 WIB
4. [Saham BREN melonjak 14% pasca kontrak baru](https://investasi.kontan.co.id/news/bren)
   Kontan | 08:15 WIB

*# INTERNATIONAL NEWS*
1. [Fed signals rate cut delayed to Q3 2026](https://reuters.com/fed-rate)
   Reuters | 08:00 WIB
2. [China PMI expands for third straight month](https://reuters.com/china-pmi)
   Reuters | 07:45 WIB
3. [Oil slides on rising US inventory data](https://reuters.com/oil-inventory)
   Reuters | 07:30 WIB
4. [ECB holds rates amid inflation uncertainty](https://reuters.com/ecb)
   Reuters | 07:10 WIB

─────────────────────────
_IDN-StockNews v0.1.0_

format_telegram_message_js.description: Drop-in replacement for the Format Telegram Message Code node in workflow-0.1.0.json. Paste jsCode value into the n8n Code node.
